character_dossiers.name: Pew
character_dossiers.biography: A blind man leading a group of men, who abandon him in a panic after his outburst. Killed by a horse during a chase.

character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: A doctor and magistrate involved in the aftermath of the incident. Receives a mysterious item from Jim Hawkins.

character_dossiers.name: Mr. Dance
character_dossiers.biography: A supervisor who investigates the incident, later joins Dr. Livesey and the squire to address the situation.

character_dossiers.name: the squire
character_dossiers.biography: A tall, rough man with a temper, described as a landowner and companion to Dr. Livesey.

character_dossiers.name: Johnny
character_dossiers.biography: A name called by Pew during his search for companions.

character_dossiers.name: Black Dog
character_dossiers.biography: A name called by Pew during his search for companions.

character_dossiers.name: Dirk
character_dossiers.biography: A name called by Pew during his search for companions.

character_dossiers.name: Jim Hawkins
character_dossiers.biography: A first-person narrator and participant in the events, later entrusted with a mysterious item.

character_dossiers.name: the supervisor
character_dossiers.biography: A figure who investigates the incident and coordinates with Dr. Livesey and the squire.

character_dossiers.name: Mr. Trelawney
character_dossiers.biography: A landowner and companion to Dr. Livesey, described as a tall, rough man with a temper.
